title: Lemon-Herb Marinated Fish Mediterranean Bowl
description: A refreshing and flavorful Mediterranean bowl featuring fresh fish, zesty lemon, and tangy pickles.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine parsley, oregano, dill, lemon juice, pickle juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Blend until well combined and slightly emulsified.
Place the cod fillets in a large molcajete or other shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the fish, making sure they are fully coated.
Cover the molcajete with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil. Remove the fish from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Place the fish on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is baking, prepare the Mediterranean salad by combining the sliced red onion, cucumber, and tomato in a bowl.
Drizzle the salad with olive oil and toss to combine.
To serve, place a cod fillet on each plate or in the molcajete. Top with a spoonful of the Mediterranean salad and a sprinkle of crumbled feta cheese.
